LAW AND MOTION 302, RULING - THE COURT VACATED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND RULED AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT CHRISTOPHER FLEMING'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS IS CONTINUED TO JULY 30, 2013 TO GIVE THE MOVING PARTY THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. MOVING PARTY MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN JULY 8, 2013 AT 4:00 PM OR THE MOTION WILL BE DENIED. Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Service Of Summons;
Off Calendar Aug-16-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. MATT A. SULLIVAN, TEL. NO. 879-1256 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT CHRISTOPHER FLEMING's Motion To Quash Service Of Summons is granted. The opposing party failed to provide courtesy copies as required by Local Rule 2.6B and the Court's order issued on July 30, 2013. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/MJM)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Service Of Summons;
Off Calendar Jul-30-2013 Continued To Aug-16-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT CHRISTOPHER FLEMING'S Motion To Quash Service Of Summons is continued to August 16, 2013, to give the opposing party a chance to comply with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6B. The opposing party shall provide a courtesy copy of its papers by August 5, 2013. Please attach a cover letter to those courtesy copies reflecting the new hearing date. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Anthony Vaughn #6185.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Service Of Summons;
Off Calendar Jul-05-2013 Continued To Jul-30-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. AARON DAWSON OF THE ALECTO LAW, TEL. NO. 534-5346 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. MATT A. SULLIVAN, TEL. NO. 879-1256 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.

RULING - THE COURT VACATED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND RULED AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT CHRISTOPHER FLEMING's Motion To Quash Service Of Summons is continued to July 30, 2013 to give the moving party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Moving party must deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than July 8, 2013 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be denied. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/MJM)
